ckt.locals: %0 |-> #OutPortRef ( "counter" , 0 ) %1 |-> "comb.add" ( %arg0 , %0 , .ValueIdList ) { .Map } : ( i8 , i8 , .Types ) -> ( i8 , .Types ) %2 |-> bits ( 5 , 8 ) : i8 %arg0 |-> #ArgRef ( 0 ) %e1 |-> "hw.enum.constant" ( .ValueIdList ) { "field" |-> #hw.enum.field < A , !hw.enum < A , B , C , .HwEnumItems > > } : ( .Types ) -> ( !hw.enum < A , B , C , .HwEnumItems > , .Types ) %e2 |-> "hw.enum.constant" ( .ValueIdList ) { "field" |-> #hw.enum.field < A , !hw.enum < A , B , C , .HwEnumItems > > } : ( .Types ) -> ( !hw.enum < A , B , C , .HwEnumItems > , .Types ) %out |-> "hw.enum.cmp" ( %e1 , %e2 , .ValueIdList ) { .Map } : ( !hw.enum < A , B , C , .HwEnumItems > , !hw.enum < A , B , C , .HwEnumItems > , .Types ) -> ( i1 , .Types )

ckt.initial: ListItem ( "sv.initial" ( .ValueIdList ) ( { "sv.passign" ( %2 , %0 , .ValueIdList ) { .Map } : ( !hw.inout < i8 > , i8 , .Types ) -> ( .Types ) "sv.for" ( %0 , %end , %1 , .ValueIdList ) ( { .OperationList ^bb0 ( %i : i8 , .ValueIdAndTypeList ) : %tmp , .OpResults = "sv.read_inout" ( %2 , .ValueIdList ) { .Map } : ( !hw.inout < i8 > , .Types ) -> ( i8 , .Types ) %next , .OpResults = "comb.add" ( %tmp , %i , .ValueIdList ) { .Map } : ( i8 , i8 , .Types ) -> ( i8 , .Types ) "sv.passign" ( %2 , %next , .ValueIdList ) { .Map } : ( !hw.inout < i8 > , i8 , .Types ) -> ( .Types ) .OperationList .BlockList } , .Regions ) { "inductionVarName" |-> "i" } : ( i8 , i8 , i8 , .Types ) -> ( .Types ) .OperationList .BlockList } , .Regions ) { .Map } : ( .Types ) -> ( .Types ) )
ckt.locals: %0 |-> bits ( 0 , 8 ) : i8 %1 |-> bits ( 1 , 8 ) : i8 %2 |-> "sv.reg" ( .ValueIdList ) { "name" |-> "reg" } : ( .Types ) -> ( !hw.inout < i8 > , .Types ) %3 |-> "sv.read_inout" ( %2 , .ValueIdList ) { .Map } : ( !hw.inout < i8 > , .Types ) -> ( i8 , .Types ) %4 |-> "comb.add" ( %3 , %1 , .ValueIdList ) { .Map } : ( i8 , i8 , .Types ) -> ( i8 , .Types ) %end |-> bits ( 5 , 8 ) : i8 %i |-> bits ( 4 , 8 ) : i8 %next |-> "comb.add" ( %tmp , %i , .ValueIdList ) { .Map } : ( i8 , i8 , .Types ) -> ( i8 , .Types ) %tmp |-> "sv.read_inout" ( %2 , .ValueIdList ) { .Map } : ( !hw.inout < i8 > , .Types ) -> ( i8 , .Types )
